title: Prologue
description: The beginning of Hoai and Niem's story

scene_01.speaker: Narrator
scene_01.text: This is sample dialogue. The story begins on a bright morning at school.

scene_01.speaker: Hoai
scene_01.text: This is sample dialogue. What a beautiful day to be at school!

scene_01.speaker: Niem
scene_01.text: This is sample dialogue. I agree! The weather is perfect today.

scene_01.speaker: Hoai
scene_01.text: This is sample dialogue. Hey {player_name}, what do you want to do today?

scene_01.prompt: What do you want to do?

scene_game.speaker: Niem
scene_game.text: This is sample dialogue. Great idea! Let's play something fun!

scene_game.speaker: Hoai
scene_game.text: This is sample dialogue. How about we play the Egg Catcher game?

scene_after_game.speaker: Niem
scene_after_game.text: This is sample dialogue. That was fun! You did great!

scene_after_game.speaker: Hoai
scene_after_game.text: This is sample dialogue. Thanks! Let's head to class now.

scene_class.speaker: Niem
scene_class.text: This is sample dialogue. Good idea. We don't want to be late!

scene_class.speaker: Narrator
scene_class.text: This is sample dialogue. They arrived at class just in time.
